title: cast(interval second value to int or decimal) is wrong (by a factor of 1000), cast(interval month value to decimal or floating point) fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE INTERVAL_TBL_1 (f1 TIME NOT NULL);
SELECT f1, TIME_TO_SEC(f1) AS f1_int, CAST(TIME_TO_SEC(f1) AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS f1_decimal, CAST(TIME_TO_SEC(f1) AS FLOAT) AS f1_float FROM INTERVAL_TBL_1;
key_bug_features: casting interval second or month values to numeric types
